tool_purpose: Calculate the annual carbon emissions produced by a specific type of vehicle based on mileage.

emission_factor.description: Optional emission factor to calculate emissions, in g/mile. Default factor is 355.48.

miles_driven.description: The number of miles driven per year.

vehicle_type.description: The type of vehicle. 'gas' refers to a gasoline vehicle, 'diesel' refers to a diesel vehicle, and 'EV' refers to an electric vehicle.

arguments.name: vehicle_type
arguments.description: The type of vehicle. 'gas' refers to a gasoline vehicle, 'diesel' refers to a diesel vehicle, and 'EV' refers to an electric vehicle.

arguments.name: miles_driven
arguments.description: The number of miles driven per year.

arguments.name: emission_factor
arguments.description: Optional emission factor to calculate emissions, in g/mile. Default factor is 355.48.

doc_snippets: Calculate the annual carbon emissions produced by a specific type of vehicle based on mileage.
